zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Neville於1224年之前出生在英國素可波萊布盧可時，她的父親John de Neville11220歲，母親Hawise Courtenay11歲。她與Sir John de la Lynde結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Neville于1224年之前出生在英国素可波萊布盧可时，她的父亲John de Neville11220岁，母亲Hawise Courtenay11岁。她与Sir John de la Lynde结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Neville was born before 1224, in Bolebrook, Sussex, England, her father, John de Neville, was 11220 and her mother, Hawise Courtenay, was 11. She married Sir John de la Lynde. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1275.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Neville est née avant 1224, à Bolebrook, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Neville, avait 11220 ans et sa mère, Hawise Courtenay, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de la Lynde. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1275.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Neville vor 1224 in Bolebrook, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Neville 11220 und ihre Mutter Hawise Courtenay 11. Sie hat Sir John de la Lynde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1275.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Neville è nata il prima del 1224 nel Bolebrook, Sussex, England, sua padre, John de Neville, aveva 11220 anni e sua madre, Hawise Courtenay, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de la Lynde. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1275.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Nevilleが1224年以前にイギリススセックスボレブルークで生まれた時，父John de Nevilleは11220歳，母Hawise Courtenayは11歳であった。Sir John de la Lyndeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Neville(이)가 1224년 이전 영국 수세스 볼레브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Neville(은)는 11220세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Courtenay(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de la Lynde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Neville nasceu antes 1224, em Bolebrook, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Neville, tinha 11220 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Courtenay, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de la Lynde. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1275.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Neville родилась перед 1224 г. в местности болебрук, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Neville было 11220 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Courtenay, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de la Lynde. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1275 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Neville nació antes de 1224, en Bolebrook, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Neville, tenía 11220 años y su mamá, Hawise Courtenay, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Sir John de la Lynde. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1275.
